description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a matte white exterior and a smooth, gently curving silhouette. The front features a black graphic of palm trees and some text, giving it a distinctive, branded appearance. The bottle has a narrow neck and a small, gold-colored cap at the top, which appears to be a screw cap. The surface is uniform in color except for the printed design, and there are no visible seams or handles. The bottle's body is slightly wider at the base, tapering smoothly toward the neck. There are no visible signs of damage, and the overall finish is clean and modern.
description: A tall, matte white bottle with a black palm tree graphic and gold screw cap, featuring a smooth, modern silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black palm tree graphic and some text on the matte white surface.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain white surface, no visible graphics or text.
description_view_2: Rear view with the palm tree graphic and additional text, all mirrored compared to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain white surface with no graphics or text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Black palm tree graphic and text on the front and rear, with a clean, modern style.
